text:
Contact (, rom. Kontakuto) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It allows a player to converse with another player they have previously met through their card binders.
__NOTOC__

| 
|-
!Card Effect:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Allows communication through the binders with target player (limited to players previously met inside the game. Maximum duration is 3 minutes; during this period, only the player initiating conversation with “Contact” can cut off communication).
|
|-
!How to Obtain:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Purchasable at the Spell Card Shop in Masadora.
|
|}

Summary

This spell allows the caster to view their list of contacts and choose one to communicate remotely with through their binder. If the target player does not have their binder out when "Contact" is cast, it will be summoned automatically. The spell lasts for three minutes. Only the caster can interrupt the communication before then.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1040 :: 
他プレイヤー１名（ゲーム内で出会ったことのあるプレイヤーに限る）と本を通じて会話することができる。（最大３分間、途中で交信を切ることができるのは「交信」を使用したプレイヤー側のみ。）
|-
![Eng]
|No.1040 :: Contact 
1 named player (restricted to players come across within the game) through using the book you are able to converse with. (Maximum of 3 minute intervals, only the player using communication is able to cut “Contact” midway through.)
|}

Trivia

The first of the many uses of this card was in Chapter 149, when Killua had Gon cast it for practice. It is what allowed them to discover that Gon had met "Chrollo Lucilfer".
The first conversation through this card occurred in Chapter 152, when Tsezguerra contacted Genthru's team for a trade.
